text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The echoing cheers of the crowd at the
Nakayama Racecourse herald the opening of the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having come to the realization that she would not
be here on luck alone, Matikanefukukitaru vows
to give the race everything she has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She steps forth to take on the Arima
Kinen—carrying the hope that running with all her
might will turn her into a lucky Umamusume who
brings joy to all.
